areaLabel: East Bank Marsh and Marsh Outpost Slice
notes: Tenth real slice keeps chapter throughput high by reusing the standardized clerk -> sentry -> gate -> shop -> chest -> encounter pattern for a marsh-side outpost. The main new pressure is continuing eastbound chapter stitching while keeping chapter-local reference packs and visual backlog generation in sync with the gameplay lock path. / 第十段真实切片继续复用已标准化的文吏 -> 守兵 -> 栅门 -> 商店 -> 宝箱 -> 遭遇战模式，把吞吐保持在沼泽边的哨所切片上。新增压力主要在于继续向东扩展章节拼接时，如何让章节级 reference pack 和视觉 backlog 生成保持与 gameplay 锁定路径同步。
title: Marsh Outpost Advance
